description: Default capabilities for Eidolon desktop app — principle of least privilege. Each permission must have a documented justification.

_comments.core:default: Base Tauri IPC — required for all window/event communication
_comments.shell:allow-open: Open external URLs in the default browser (e.g. GitHub links). Restricted by regex in tauri.conf.json plugins.shell.open to https?:// only
_comments.shell:allow-execute / shell:allow-spawn: Launch the eidolon-cli sidecar binary for the daemon process. Scoped to only the bundled sidecar with any args.
_comments.updater:default: Check for and install application updates from the configured endpoint
_comments.process:allow-restart: Restart the app after applying an update
